description: A.U.E. is an informal, well-hidden organization of Russian criminals, mainly consisting of children and teenagers, often indirectly ruled by adult criminals. It originated in Siberia and other parts of Russia, with roots in the 1980s but surfacing in the 2010s. The group engages in theft, murder, robbery, racketeering, extortion, and drug trafficking, primarily within educational and youth correction institutions. In 2020, the Supreme Court of Russia recognized it as an extremist movement and banned it.
